title: Veeam security advisory (AV26-229)
description: On March 12, 2026, Veeam published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Veeam Backup & Replication  12 versions prior to 12.3.2.4165
Veeam Backup & Replication  13 versions prior to 13.0.1.2067
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
